## Type of Change

- [ ] New automation script / tool
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Test addition or improvement

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, credentials, or secrets committed
- [ ] No real IOCs or investigation data included
- [ ] Sensitive values use environment variables (`.env` pattern)
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed for known CVEs

## Code Quality

- [ ] Code passes `flake8 --select=E9,F63,F7,F82` (syntax errors only)
- [ ] New functions have type hints and docstrings
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for changed logic
- [ ] Tests pass locally: `pytest tests/ -v`
